reasoning: Historically, Google held the top spot roughly ~15-20% of the time. Polymarket had them ranked highly at 44% in June 2025. However, recent evidence suggests OpenAI has released GPT-5 (and potentially other models like o3/o4-mini) around August 2025, topping the leaderboards. With only two months left in 2025, it's a tight window for Google to release a model capable of beating GPT-5 before December 31, 2025. While Gemini 2.5 Pro took the #1 spot in March 2025, OpenAI's subsequent releases likely pushed Google down. The base rate for any given company holding the #1 spot when a major competitor just released their flagship model is low. Thus, I estimate Google's probability at around 25%.
